allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'src'\); import main; print\('app imports OK; routes:', sorted\({r.path for r in main.app.routes if r.path.startswith\(\('/watchlist','/financenotes','/ingest','/health'\)\)}\)\)")
Bash(grep -n "make dev\\|^pytest\\| pytest$\\|run on the host\\|host uvicorn" README.md)

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.venv/bin/python" -m black --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
